title: Ticker Fundamentals
description: Ten years of valuation and fundamentals for a single ticker, computed from SEC XBRL facts via the equity_metric_series view (migration 0002).

list.name: ticker
list.label: Ticker
list.query: SELECT symbol FROM instruments WHERE kind = 'equity' AND taxonomy IS NOT NULL ORDER BY symbol
list.definition: SELECT symbol FROM instruments WHERE kind = 'equity' AND taxonomy IS NOT NULL ORDER BY symbol

list.name: metric_left
list.label: Left axis
list.query: P/E : pe, Revenue : revenue, Operating margin : op_margin, P/FCF : pfcf, Total debt : debt

list.name: metric_right
list.label: Right axis
list.query: P/E : pe, Revenue : revenue, Operating margin : op_margin, P/FCF : pfcf, Total debt : debt

panels.title: $ticker — $metric_left (left) vs $metric_right (right)
panels.description: Pick any two metrics with the 'Left axis' / 'Right axis' selectors above; each gets its own y-axis scale. Quarterly metrics connect across report dates (spanNulls).

targets.rawSql: SELECT s."time", s.label AS metric, s.value FROM equity_metric_series s JOIN instruments i ON i.id = s.instrument_id WHERE i.symbol = '$ticker' AND s.metric = '$metric_left' AND $__timeFilter(s."time") ORDER BY 1

SELECT s."time", s.label AS metric, s.value FROM equity_metric_series s JOIN instruments i ON i.id = s.instrument_id WHERE i.symbol = '$ticker' AND s.metric = '$metric_right' AND $__timeFilter(s."time") ORDER BY 1

panels.title: P/E (TTM)
panels.description: Daily close divided by trailing-twelve-month diluted EPS (quarterly EPS summed, Q4 derived from the 10-K). No point is drawn while TTM EPS is negative or the last report is older than ~15 months.

targets.rawSql: SELECT s."time", s.label AS metric, s.value FROM equity_metric_series s JOIN instruments i ON i.id = s.instrument_id WHERE i.symbol = '$ticker' AND s.metric = 'pe' AND $__timeFilter(s."time") ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Revenue (TTM)
panels.description: Trailing-twelve-month revenue: one point per reported quarter end (annual filers get one point per fiscal year).

targets.rawSql: SELECT s."time", s.label AS metric, s.value FROM equity_metric_series s JOIN instruments i ON i.id = s.instrument_id WHERE i.symbol = '$ticker' AND s.metric = 'revenue' AND $__timeFilter(s."time") ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Operating margin (TTM)
panels.description: TTM operating income over TTM revenue. Stands in for ROIC, which cannot be computed reliably from curated SEC facts (it needs tax and invested-capital detail that filers tag inconsistently).

targets.rawSql: SELECT s."time", s.label AS metric, s.value FROM equity_metric_series s JOIN instruments i ON i.id = s.instrument_id WHERE i.symbol = '$ticker' AND s.metric = 'op_margin' AND $__timeFilter(s."time") ORDER BY 1

panels.title: P/FCF (TTM)
panels.description: Market cap (daily close × latest weighted diluted shares) over TTM free cash flow (operating cash flow minus capex). No point is drawn while TTM FCF is negative; missing if the filer doesn't tag capex.

targets.rawSql: SELECT s."time", s.label AS metric, s.value FROM equity_metric_series s JOIN instruments i ON i.id = s.instrument_id WHERE i.symbol = '$ticker' AND s.metric = 'pfcf' AND $__timeFilter(s."time") ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Total debt
panels.description: Balance-sheet debt at each report date, composed from the components the filer tags (long-term debt incl. current portion, plus short-term borrowings) without double counting.

targets.rawSql: SELECT s."time", s.label AS metric, s.value FROM equity_metric_series s JOIN instruments i ON i.id = s.instrument_id WHERE i.symbol = '$ticker' AND s.metric = 'debt' AND $__timeFilter(s."time") ORDER BY 1
